description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) in autonomous mode was traveling southwest on Michigan Avenue towards Euclid Court in Santa Monica when 
it was struck on the passenger side by an SUV (Vehicle 2), traveling southeast on Euclid Court, which failed to yield the right-of-way and 
entered the Zoox vehicle's travel path. The Zoox vehicle braked, the vehicle operator disengaged, continued to brake, and steered left, but 
contact was unavoidable. The Zoox vehicle sustained moderate damage, and Vehicle 2 also sustained damage. There were no reported 
injuries, and the police were not notified.
Print
Clear Form
